title: NZS 3404:1997 Steel Member Design
description: Design standard and custom steel members in accordance with NZS 3404.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

steel_grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit section yield strength.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Total height (or diameter) of section.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Total width of section.

t_f_input.description: tf. Symbol: t_f. Units: mm. Flange thickness, or top/btm wall thickness (RHS/SHS) or CHS thickness.

t_w_input.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: mm. Web thickness, or side wall thickness (RHS/SHS).

r_input.description: r. Symbol: r. Units: mm. Fillet radius.

F_y_flange_input.description: fy.flange. Symbol: f_{y.f}. Units: MPa. Flange yield strength (open sections) or section yield strength (hollow sections).

F_u_flange_input.description: fu.flange. Symbol: f_{u.f}. Units: MPa. Flange tensile strength (open sections) or section tensile strength (hollow sections).

F_y_web_input.description: fy.web. Symbol: f_{y.w}. Units: MPa. Web yield strength.

F_u_web_input.description: fu.web. Symbol: f_{u.w}. Units: MPa. Web tensile strength.

restraint.description: Restraint Arrangement. Symbol: Restraint. Select flexure restraints at ends of segment. Refer NZS 3404 Clause 5.4 for further information.F = Fully RestrainedP = Partially Restrained L = Laterally RestrainedU = UnrestrainedSelect Continuous Lateral Restraint for members with full lateral restraint.

end_restraint.description: End Rotation Restraint. Symbol: End\;Restraint. Select which ends are restrained against lateral rotation, used to calculate kr. Refer NZS 3404 Table 5.6.3(3) for further information.

load_height.description: Load Height. Symbol: Load\;Height. Select applied load height, used to calculate kl. Refer NZS 3404 Table 5.6.3(2) for further information.

load_position.description: Load Position. Symbol: Load\;Position. Longitudinal position of applied loading to segment, used to calculate kl. Refer NZS 3404 Table 5.6.3(2) for further information.

L_z_flexure_input.description: Lz.flexure. Symbol: L_{z.flexure}. Units: mm. Distance between intermediate or end flexural restraints in the minor axis (Z) direction.

alpha_m_method.description: αm Method. Symbol: α_{m}\;Method. Select the method for determining the moment modification factor, αm.User-Defined: Enter the value of αm directly.Auto: Automatically calculate αm based on the design bending moment distribution, as per NZS 3404 Eq. 5.6.1.1(2).

alpha_m.description: αm. Symbol: α_{m}. Moment modification factor, refer NZS 3404 Clause 5.6.1.

M_2_input.description: M*2. Symbol: M^*_{2}. Units: kN*m. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment at quarter point of segment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.Note, loading axes should match the Applied Loading Axes input.

M_3_input.description: M*3. Symbol: M^*_{3}. Units: kN*m. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment at quarter point of segment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.Note, loading axes should match the Applied Loading Axes input.

M_4_input.description: M*4. Symbol: M^*_{4}. Units: kN*m. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment at quarter point of segment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.Note, loading axes should match the Applied Loading Axes input.

L_z_comp_input.description: Lz.comp. Symbol: L_{z.comp}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Z-axis.

L_y_comp_input.description: Ly.comp. Symbol: L_{y.comp}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Y-axis.

ke_z_input.description: ke.z. Symbol: k_{e.z}. Effective length factor for compression buckling about the Z-axis. Refer NZS 3404 Figure 4.8.3.2.

ke_y_input.description: ke.y. Symbol: k_{e.y}. Effective length factor for compression buckling about the Y-axis. Refer NZS 3404 Figure 4.8.3.2.

kt_input.description: kte. Symbol: k_{te}. Correction factor for distribution of tensile forces. Refer NZS 3404 Table 7.3.2.

M_fz_input.description: M*z. Symbol: M^*_{z}. Units: kN*m. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

M_fy_input.description: M*y. Symbol: M^*_{y}. Units: kN*m. Minor (Y) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

V_fy_input.description: V*y. Symbol: V^*_{y}. Units: kN. Major (Y) Axis Factored Shear.

V_fz_input.description: V*z. Symbol: V^*_{z}. Units: kN. Minor (Z) Axis Factored Shear.

N_f_input.description: N*. Symbol: N^*. Units: kN. Factored Axial (X) Force. Positive value represents compression.

load_axes.description: Applied Loading Axes. Symbol: Load\;Axes. Select which axis system design loads have been calculated for. Design loads in Geometric Axes will be rotated to Principal Axes for Capacity Checks.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
